careersHeadline: Build products that help teams hire better.
careersSubtitle: We are hiring across product, engineering, and operations. Join us to shape the future of recruiting.

careersTeamMembers.blurb: Leads distributed teams delivering product and platform initiatives.

careersTeamMembers.blurb: Partners with hiring teams to build strong and inclusive pipelines.

talentProfilesHeadline: Illustrative specialist profiles aligned to modern delivery needs.
talentProfilesDescription: Expert profiles designed to match evolving project needs, combining the right skills and experience for modern digital delivery.

talentProfiles.summary: Fintech, SaaS, and data platform modernization
talentProfiles.detailedSummary: Supports cloud transformation, data platform modernization, and governance-heavy delivery programs for product-led teams.

talentProfiles.summary: B2B SaaS, enterprise portals, and digital products
talentProfiles.detailedSummary: Builds modern product interfaces and backend integrations for enterprise workflows, customer portals, and internal platforms.

talentProfiles.name: Rohan Iyer
talentProfiles.detailedSummary: Focuses on applied AI delivery, model operations, and automation initiatives that move from experimentation into production.

talentProfiles.name: Ishita Rao
talentProfiles.summary: SaaS roadmap strategy, GTM alignment, and growth delivery
talentProfiles.detailedSummary: Drives cross-functional planning, prioritization, and commercial alignment for fast-moving B2B product programs.

talentProfiles.name: Karan Malhotra
talentProfiles.summary: CI/CD reliability, cloud security, and platform automation
talentProfiles.detailedSummary: Improves deployment reliability, infrastructure automation, and cloud guardrails for engineering teams operating at scale.

talentProfiles.name: Meera Khanna
